custom-sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(SN_WallEntry.wallEntryId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM SN_WallEntry WHERE ( (SN_WallEntry.groupId = ?) OR (SN_WallEntry.groupId = ?) ) AND ( (SN_WallEntry.userId = ?) OR (SN_WallEntry.userId = ?) )

SELECT {SN_WallEntry.*} FROM SN_WallEntry WHERE ( (SN_WallEntry.groupId = ?) OR (SN_WallEntry.groupId = ?) ) AND ( (SN_WallEntry.userId = ?) OR (SN_WallEntry.userId = ?) ) ORDER BY SN_WallEntry.createDate DESC
